summary: A list of {{<layer> <value>} ...} pairs. LEF PIN/OBS shapes on each <layer> that are polygons (not simple rects), will be extended with OBS SPACING 0 rects by <value> (in microns) in the preferred routing direction. This is a workaround for some advanced node libraries to avoid spacing violations during routing.
